name: json-extraction
description: Extract structured fields from invoice-style text as JSON.
rubric: Score relevance (0-10) by whether the output extracts the requested invoice fields (invoice number, total, and any others present). Score faithfulness (0-10) by whether the extracted values exactly match the source text and the output is valid JSON with no invented fields.

test_cases.input: Invoice #A-100 dated 2024-02-01. Bill to: Acme Corp. Total due: $250.00.
Receipt number 7782, billed to Globex, amount $99.50, paid on 2024-03-12.
